title: gelseminum grandiflorum
intro: Gelseminum grandiflorum, also known as Chinese foxglove or Yellow Yunnan Hellebore, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Gelseminum grandiflorum include its use in treating hypertension, cardiovascular disease, and certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of this plant often include extracts and tinctures, which can be used to create medicinal teas, capsules, and topical creams.
